title: OpenRAN solution suite
abstract: Systems, methods and computer software are disclosed for providing an OpenRAN solution suite. In one embodiment, a method is disclosed, the method including communicating, by an all G COTS (Commercial off the Shelf) Base Band Unit (BBU), with a plurality of different G user devices; communicating, by a software platform, with the all G COTS BBU, wherein the software platform includes virtualized software providing open RAN controller functionality, network orchestrator functionality, and SON edge core functionality; and communicating, by the software platform, with a plurality of different G core networks.
claims: 1. A method of providing an Open Radio Access Network (OpenRAN) solution suite, comprising: providing, at a baseband unit (BBU) virtualization software platform, pooled BBU server capacity via at least two of a virtual eNodeB (vENB) baseband function, a virtual gNodeB (vGNB) baseband function, and a virtual base transceiver station (vBTS), the BBU virtualization software platform facilitating radio access via a radio transceiver to a plurality of different G user devices; and providing, across the BBU virtualization software platform and an edge core functionality, virtualized software providing network orchestrator functionality, automation functionality, and self-organizing network (SON) edge core functionality for a plurality of different G core networks, thereby providing automation across at least two of 2G, 4G, and 5G radios.
